rationale: The cited article examines aggregate U.S. customer satisfaction and macro discretionary spending growth, whereas the citing paper studies customer-level payment-plan effects on service defection via commitment projection in product-service bundles. The citing note does not indicate that the cited paper’s model, mechanism, or data are used substantively (satisfaction is mentioned mainly as an alternative explanation to rule out), and the match evidence is only a bare DOI reference with no contextual excerpt. This pair therefore appears to be a likely background/incidental mention rather than a core dependency.
